_comment: Pins the release model for the /draft-release and /publish-release skills.
Detection gets everything else right on its own; only 'artifacts' cannot be inferred,
because release.yml uploads via `gh release upload` (which names its files at runtime)
rather than declaring a static `files:` block. Without this list, /publish-release falls
back to comparing against the previous release — which does not exist yet for 0.1.0, so
it could not verify anything at all on the first release.
Keep this list in step with the build matrix in .github/workflows/release.yml.
